info.title: Traigent Billing — Paddle Integration
info.description: Public-surface Flask routes covering the Paddle integration: subscription-plan catalog (public), customer portal URL, checkout intent, and the inbound webhook. Codex priority audit P5: split out of the temporary `billing_extra_endpoints.json` into semantic groups before TraigentSchema absorption.

get.summary: Public: list available subscription plans and opaque checkout options

200.description: Public plan catalog without Paddle price IDs.

get.summary: Return the URL for the Paddle customer portal

default.description: Response shape pending — see Flask handler in TraigentBackend/src/routes/ for actual return shape; full request/response schemas tracked as follow-up.

post.summary: Create a Paddle checkout intent from an opaque Traigent checkout ID
Public webhook: Paddle billing-event callback (signature verified)

default.description: Response shape pending — see Flask handler in TraigentBackend/src/routes/ for actual return shape; full request/response schemas tracked as follow-up.
